ecosystem: Espressif ESP-IDF projects for ESP32-class MCUs
description: Build, inspect, flash, and monitor Espressif ESP-IDF projects for ESP32-class microcontrollers. Use when Codex needs to run idf.py build, idf.py flash, idf.py monitor, diagnose sdkconfig/CMake issues, or inspect ESP-IDF artifacts.
adapter_notes: Use idf.py as the native backend. Detect ESP_IDF_PATH, IDF_TOOLS_PATH, Python environment, target chip, sdkconfig, CMake build dir, and serial port. Support --dry-run before flash.
